schema.purpose: Codex-readable, app-compatible JLPT N4 learning data with corrected Simplified Chinese meanings and natural short Japanese examples. Public N4 lists vary, so this file is an expanded, de-duplicated N4-specific list aligned to the uploaded AYAYA N5 schema.

fields.headword: 学习用规范词形。旧写法或不常用写法会保留在 source_form。
fields.source_form: 来源词形；多个常见写法用分号保留。
fields.reading: 主读音，通常为平假名；外来语保留片假名。
fields.reading_variants: 原始读音字段中的所有读音。
fields.romaji: 用于搜索/调试的简易罗马字。
fields.part_of_speech: 粗粒度词性，供 Codex 和应用生成卡片使用。
fields.kanji_readings: 含汉字词形的整词读音，用于生成 ruby/furigana。
fields.examples: 三个自然、短句优先的日语例句；zh 为简体中文翻译。
fields.note_zh: 必要时说明写法、用法或兼容注意。

compatibility.AYAYA_N4_TATOEBA_EXAMPLES: 同名变量被设置为本文件的精选例句对象，便于现有 app.js 的 buildExamples 优先读取。

source_notes: Vocabulary merged and normalized from public JLPT N4 lists; no official JEES/JF fixed vocabulary list exists for current JLPT.
The uploaded N5 files were used as the compatibility/schema target.
Examples are newly written short study sentences rather than copied corpus sentences.
